title: mallotus dunnii
intro: Mallotus dunnii, also known as the Chinese varnish tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The leaves, bark, and roots of the plant are used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Mallotus dunnii is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
